_comment: Legend in the Mist — Theme Content Import Template. Remove _comment fields before importing. All fields are optional and default to empty/origin.

themebooks.name: Example Theme Book
themebooks.description: A short description of what this theme is about.

specialImprovements.name: Improvement Name
specialImprovements.description: Description of what this special improvement does.

themeKits.name: Example Theme Kit
themeKits._comment_themebookName: Must match the name of a theme book in this file or already in the world
themeKits.quest: A short quest statement for this theme kit.

tropes.name: Example Trope
tropes.description: A short description of this trope.
tropes._comment_presetKits: Names of theme kits in this file or the world. Exactly 3 preset slots.
tropes._comment_choiceKits: Names of theme kits. Exactly 3 choice slots — player picks one.
